/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/charging_terminal.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/charging_terminal.dir/src/device/modbus_bus.c.o CMakeFiles/charging_terminal.dir/src/device/temperature_sensor.c.o CMakeFiles/charging_terminal.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/charging_terminal.dir/src/ui/cabinet_card.c.o CMakeFiles/charging_terminal.dir/src/ui/ui_status_card.c.o CMakeFiles/charging_terminal.dir/src/ui/ui_top_bar.c.o -o bin/charging_terminal  lib/liblvgl.a lib/liblv_drivers.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libmodbus.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so lib/liblvgl.a
